title: lotus ornithopodioides
intro: Lotus ornithopodioides, also known as lotus corniculatus or bird's foot trefoil, is a flowering plant in the pea family (Fabaceae). The plant is rich in medicinal properties, containing saponins, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which have anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of lotus ornithopodioides include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support the immune system, as well as its use in traditional medicine to treat various ailments. Lotus ornithopodioides is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is also used as a food source for livestock and as a soil stabilizer in landscaping.
